song.title: Have Thine Own Way Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Have Thine own way, Lord! Have Thine own way! Thou art the Potter, I am the clay. Mold me and make me after Thy will, While I am waiting, yielded and still.
[V2] 2) Have Thine own way, Lord! Have Thine own way! Search me and try me, Master, today. Whiter than snow, Lord, wash me just now, As in Thy presence humbly I bow.
[V3] 3) Have Thine own way, Lord! Have Thine own way! Wounded and weary, help me, I pray. Power, all power, surely is Thine, Touch me and heal me, Savior divine.
[V4] 4) Have Thine own way, Lord! Have Thine own way! Hold o’er my being absolute sway. Fill with Thy Spirit till all shall see Christ only, always, living in me.
song.author: Adelaide Addison Pollard
